mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inbound_order ( order_no, supplier_id, supplier_name, total_amount, order_status, remark ) VALUES ( #{orderNo}, #{supplierId}, #{supplierName}, #{totalAmount}, #{orderStatus}, #{remark} )
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inbound_order io
io.order_no LIKE CONCAT('%', #{orderNo}, '%')
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ai_recognition_record air WHERE air.doc_type = 'inbound' AND air.confirmed_order_id = io.id )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ai_recognition_record air WHERE air.doc_type = 'inbound' AND air.confirmed_order_id = io.id )
AND io.order_status = #{orderStatus}

SELECT io.id, io.order_no AS orderNo, io.supplier_id AS supplierId, io.supplier_name AS supplierName, io.total_amount AS totalAmount, io.order_status AS orderStatus, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ai_recognition_record air WHERE air.doc_type = 'inbound' AND air.confirmed_order_id = io.id ) THEN 'AI' ELSE 'MANUAL' END AS sourceType, ( SELECT air.id FROM ai_recognition_record air WHERE air.doc_type = 'inbound' AND air.confirmed_order_id = io.id ORDER BY air.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS aiRecordId, ( SELECT air.task_no FROM ai_recognition_record air WHERE air.doc_type = 'inbound' AND air.confirmed_order_id = io.id ORDER BY air.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS aiTaskNo, ( SELECT air.source_file_name FROM ai_recognition_record air WHERE air.doc_type = 'inbound' AND air.confirmed_order_id = io.id ORDER BY air.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) AS aiSourceFileName, io.remark, io.created_time AS createdTime FROM inbound_order io WHERE io.id = #{id}
select id, order_no, supplier_id, supplier_name, total_amount, remark, order_status, created_time, updated_time from inbound_order where id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inbound_order WHERE supplier_id IS NULL AND supplier_name = #{supplierName}
